SessionStart.description: Load learned rules from ~/.sprint-forge/rules.md and show active sprint summary

PreToolUse.description: Track edits for quality gate checks (PostTaskComplete trigger)

hooks.command: node -e "console.error('[SprintForge] Before commit: have you run quality gates?');console.error('[SprintForge] Checklist: lint, typecheck, tests, reviewer')"

PreToolUse.description: Remind to run quality gates before commit

PostToolUse.description: Check for console.log, debugger, secrets, TODOs after code edits

PostToolUse.matcher: tool == "Bash" && tool_input.command matches "(npm test|pnpm test|yarn test|pytest|go test|dart test|flutter test)"

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const out=i.tool_output?.output||'';if(/fail|error|FAIL/i.test(out)){console.error('[SprintForge] Tests failed — invoking debugger for root cause analysis');console.error('[SprintForge] TaskFailed: '+out.split('\n').find(l=>/fail|error/i.test(l))?.slice(0,80))}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Detect test failures and suggest debugger agent invocation

Stop.description: Context-aware reminders: save re-entry prompts, run retro if sprint active
Auto-capture [LEARN] blocks from responses into rules.md

SessionEnd.description: Prompt for learnings, update rules.md, save session stats

UserPromptSubmit.description: Detect task drift during sprint execution and remind about current task
Check if learned rules are about to be violated and warn

PreCompact.description: Save re-entry prompt before context compaction (ContextWarning event)

SubagentStart.description: Log agent lifecycle for sprint observability

SubagentStop.description: Log agent completion for sprint tracking

TaskCompleted.description: PostTaskComplete: run reviewer checklist, update sprint checkpoint

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);console.error('[SprintForge] Tool failed: '+(i.tool||'unknown'));console.error('[SprintForge] Consider invoking debugger agent for investigation');console.log(d)})"

PostToolUseFailure.description: TaskFailed: detect failures and suggest debugger invocation
